core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Swiss Typographic Style meets Cyber-Security Dashboard.
Content is King: Data density without clutter. The anomaly is the hero.
Negative Space: Use whitespace to isolate critical alerts.
Contrast: High contrast for readability in high-stress environments.
anti_patterns: No 'Access Denied' generic pages—use redirected flows.

rules: Use 'IBM Plex Sans' for a technical, human-interface look.
Data values and Logs must use Monospace font for alignment.
Status labels must be uppercase and tracking-widest.

layout_strategies.surface_style: Grid Borders: No soft shadows. Use 1px solid borders (border-slate-200) to define areas. Active elements get a 2px dark border.

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-transform active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium
buttons.destructive: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-none overflow-hidden

inputs.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 focus:border-slate-900 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-slate-900 rounded-md h-10 px-3 text-sm transition-all

navigation.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-slate-900 text-white p-6 flex flex-col gap-2 z-50
navigation.sidebar_item: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-md text-slate-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors

tables.header: bg-slate-50 text-slate-500 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-medium h-10 px-4 text-left

charts.style: Clean lines, minimal grid lines. Use theme colors for data series. Tooltips must be custom styled (bg-slate-900 text-white).

images.description: Abstract geometric structure, black and white. Use with 'mix-blend-overlay' or high opacity white overlay for subtle texture.
Subtle teal/white pattern for user home cards or empty states.

ui_behavior.USER: Simple view. No sidebar. Single centered card 'Welcome'. Logout top-right.
ui_behavior.ADMIN: Full dashboard view. Sidebar navigation. Access to Metrics, Logs, Users.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Use slate-500 for secondary text on white.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings (ring-2 ring-slate-900 offset-2).
accessibility.aria: Use aria-labels for icon-only buttons. Use shadcn primitives which handle aria internally.

instructions_to_main_agent: Setup 'IBM Plex Sans' from Google Fonts in index.css.
Use 'react-router-dom' for role-based protection (Create a PrivateRoute component).
For the Backend: Ensure '/login' returns { token, role, user }. Store token and role in localStorage.
For the Dashboard: Implement 'Recharts' for: 1. LineChart (Login activity over time), 2. PieChart (Risk distribution).
For Logs: Create a sortable/filterable table using Shadcn Table.
For User Management: Create a list view with 'Promote to Admin' action.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL buttons, inputs, and links.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle patterns.
Avoid centering text in main content areas; use left-align for readability.
Ensure the sidebar is collapsible on mobile.
Never use 'alert()' for errors. Use UI feedback or toasts.
